text: - v. Umbrella/Excess Liability Insurance written  on  an  occurrence basis in excess  of  the  Commercial  General  Liability  (off-site  coverage  only  for Enrolled  Parties) ,  Employer's  Liability,  and  Business  Auto  Liability Insurance identified above, and which is at least as broad as each and every one of the underlying policies. The umbrella/excess liability policies shall be written on a 'drop -down' and 'following form' basis, with only such exceptions as Owner shall expressly approve in writing.
